calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output); if(r.session_id) text(`SESSION_ID=${r.session_id}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73500243 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output); if(r.session_id) text(`SESSION_ID=${r.session_id}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73500243 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor; find data/cases/scotus/73500243 -maxdepth 6 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output); if(r.session_id) text(`SESSION_ID=${r.session_id}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73500243/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml; sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73500243/record/snapshots/2026-07-18.json; sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73500243/record/documents/documents.json; wc -l -c data/cases/scotus/73500243/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73500243/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73500243/record/documents/questions-presented.txt;

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"^(INTRODUCTION|STATEMENT|REASONS FOR GRANTING|REASONS FOR DENYING|ARGUMENT|CONCLUSION|OPINIONS BELOW|JURISDICTION|CONSTITUTIONAL|TABLE OF CONTENTS|I\\.|II\\.|III\\.|IV\\.|V\\.)\" data/cases/scotus/73500243/record/documents/petition.txt | head -n 120","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output); if(r.session_id) text(`SESSION_ID=${r.session_id}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '90,175p' data/cases/scotus/73500243/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '300,1380p' data/cases/scotus/73500243/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output); if(r.session_id) text(`SESSION_ID=${r.session_id}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '540,760p' data/cases/scotus/73500243/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '761,1005p' data/cases/scotus/73500243/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '1006,1245p' data/cases/scotus/73500243/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output); if(r.session_id) text(`SESSION_ID=${r.session_id}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert petitions|Segment base rate by salience band|relist|CVSG|originating circuit|fee class|2025 Term|2024 Term|Term\" metrics/statpack.md | head -n 160","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output); if(r.session_id) text(`SESSION_ID=${r.session_id}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,170p' metrics/statpack.md; rg -n 'salience' metrics/statpack.md metrics/statpack.json | head -n 80","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":22000}); text(r.output); if(r.session_id) text(`SESSION_ID=${r.session_id}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json; jq '.. | objects | select((.term? == \"2025\") or (.Term? == \"2025\"))' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 220","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":16000}); text(r.output); if(r.session_id) text(`SESSION_ID=${r.session_id}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '.terms' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output); if(r.session_id) text(`SESSION_ID=${r.session_id}`);
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); matches.slice(0,50).forEach(x=>text(x));

const a = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:["scotus"],q:"\"qualified immunity\" \"clearly established\" specificity",filed_after:"2017-01-01",fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","absolute_url","snippet"],order_by:"score desc",num_results:10}); text(a);

const a = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"fabrication of evidence\" (knowingly OR reckless) \"due process\" qualified immunity",filed_after:"2015-01-01",fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","court_id","absolute_url","snippet"],order_by:"score desc",num_results:15}); text(a);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output); if(r.session_id) text(`SESSION_ID=${r.session_id}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --limit 8 2>&1","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output); if(r.session_id) text(`SESSION_ID=${r.session_id}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ; if [ -d data/cases/scotus/73500243/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z ]; then find data/cases/scotus/73500243/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -print; fi","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output); if(r.session_id) text(`SESSION_ID=${r.session_id}`)
